languages.text: "Словечки-то наши? Искупление для одного пошло от старой традиции, мол, если весь полк подох, кроме одного, ему все грехи прощаются и ждет его вечная и верная служба Богу-Императору. А искупление, оно ж тоже разное бывает. Комиссарская брехня — это ложь. Потому как предки наши от этих лживых духов-искусителей ничего доброго никогда не видали. Ну а остальное у Ведки спросите лучше".

"The sayings, you mean? Atonement for the one comes from an old tradition that, if the whole regiment perishes except for one, then all of that person's wrongdoings are forgiven and eternal and faithful service to the God-Emperor awaits them. But atonement takes many forms. Commissar claptrap means lies, because our forebears never got any good from those deceitful, tempting spirits. If you want to know the rest, you should ask Vedka."
languages.original_text: "Словечки-то наши? Искупление для одного пошло от старой традиции, мол, если весь полк подох, кроме одного, ему все грехи прощаются и ждет его вечная и верная служба Богу-Императору. А искупление, оно ж тоже разное бывает. Комиссарская брехня — это ложь. Потому как предки наши от этих лживых духов-искусителей ничего доброго никогда не видали. Ну а остальное у Ведки спросите лучше".

traits.locale_text: "The sayings you mean? The redemption for one comes from an old tradition that, if the whole regiment perishes except for one, all of that person's wrongdoings are forgiven and eternal and faithful service to the God-Emperor awaits them. Yet redemption takes many forms. That 'Commissar claptrap' is nothing but falsehoods since our forebears never received any good from those deceitful, tempting spirits. If you want to know the rest you should ask Vedka."

"The sayings, you mean? Atonement for the one comes from an old tradition that, if the whole regiment perishes except for one, then all of that person's wrongdoings are forgiven and eternal and faithful service to the God-Emperor awaits them. But atonement takes many forms. That 'commissar claptrap' is nothing but falsehoods, since our forebears never got any good from those deceitful, tempting spirits. If you want to know the rest, you should ask Vedka."

"Well, if you insist... Freedom for the one — it comes from an old tradition that, if the whole regiment perishes except for one, all of that person's wrongdoings are forgiven. Commissar words are bullshit, deceit, and lies. Just nonsense pouring into your ears. And the Valancius gift is a kind of augmentation, though I don't like the term. The First Call-Up got theirs courtesy of your Seberian. Well, the Call-Ups — I guess you could compare it to generations. The First Call-Up, you understand, were the ones who came to the planet."

"The sayings you mean? The redemption for one comes from an old tradition that, if the whole regiment perishes except for one, all of that person's wrongdoings are forgiven and eternal and faithful service to the God-Emperor awaits them. Yet redemption takes many forms. That 'Commissar claptrap' is nothing but falsehoods since our forebears never received any good from those deceitful, tempting spirits. If you want to know the rest you should ask Vedka."

"The sayings, you mean? Atonement for the one comes from an old tradition that, if the whole regiment perishes except for one, then all of that person's wrongdoings are forgiven and eternal and faithful service to the God-Emperor awaits them. But atonement takes many forms. That 'commissar claptrap' is nothing but falsehoods, since our forebears never got any good from those deceitful, tempting spirits. If you want to know the rest, you should ask Vedka."

Atonement for the one comes from an old tradition that, if the whole regiment perishes except for one, then all of that person's wrongdoings are forgiven and eternal and faithful service to the God-Emperor awaits them. But atonement takes many forms. Commissar claptrap means lies, because our forebears never got any good from those deceitful, tempting spirits. If you want to know the rest, you should ask Vedka."

languages.text: 「そうまで言うなら…『唯一生存者の自由』というのがあってな。連隊が全滅して一人だけ生き残った場合、その者の過ちはすべて赦されるという古い慣習だ。政治将校の言葉なんぞ、たわごとで、欺瞞で、嘘っぱち。耳に流し込むだけの戯言だ。それから『ヴァランシウスの贈り物』は一種のオーグメンテーションだ――この呼び名は好きじゃないがな。第一召集組は、お前のセベリアンの口利きでそれを与えられた。まあ、『召集』ってのは世代みたいなもんだと思ってくれ。第一召集は、この惑星に来た連中のことだ」
languages.original_text: "Well, if you insist... Freedom for the one — it comes from an old tradition that, if the whole regiment perishes except for one, all of that person's wrongdoings are forgiven. Commissar words are bullshit, deceit, and lies. Just nonsense pouring into your ears. And the Valancius gift is a kind of augmentation, though I don't like the term. The First Call-Up got theirs courtesy of your Seberian. Well, the Call-Ups — I guess you could compare it to generations. The First Call-Up, you understand, were the ones who came to the planet."

traits.locale_text: そうまで言うなら……『唯一生存者の自由』というのがあってな。連隊が全滅して一人だけ生き残った場合、その者の過ちはすべて赦されるという古い慣習だ。政治将校の言葉なんぞ、たわごとで、欺瞞で、嘘っぱち。耳に流し込むだけの戯言だ。それから『ヴァランシウスの贈り物』は一種のオーグメンテーションだ――この呼び名は好きじゃないがな。第一召集組は、お前のセベリアンの口利きでそれを与えられた。まあ、『召集』ってのは世代みたいなもんだと思ってくれ。第一召集は、この惑星に来た連中のことだ。

languages.text: « Les formules consacrées, vous voulez dire ? "Expiation pour un seul" est une expression issue d'une vieille tradition : si un régiment entier périt à l'exception d'un seul soldat, tous les méfaits du survivant sont pardonnés, et il est voué à servir éternellement l'Empereur-Dieu. Mais l'expiation prend de nombreuses formes. Les "boniments des commissaires" sont des mensonges, car nos ancêtres n'ont jamais rien reçu de bon de la part de ces esprits fourbes et tentateurs. Si vous voulez savoir le reste, vous devriez demander à Vedka. »
languages.original_text: "The sayings, you mean? Atonement for the one comes from an old tradition that, if the whole regiment perishes except for one, then all of that person's wrongdoings are forgiven and eternal and faithful service to the God-Emperor awaits them. But atonement takes many forms. Commissar claptrap means lies, because our forebears never got any good from those deceitful, tempting spirits. If you want to know the rest, you should ask Vedka."

Mais l'expiation prend de nombreuses formes. Les "boniments des commissaires" sont des mensonges, car nos ancêtres n'ont jamais rien reçu de bon de la part de ces esprits fourbes et tentateurs. Si vous voulez savoir le reste, vous devriez demander à Vedka. »

« Les formules consacrées, vous voulez dire ? "Expiation pour un seul" est une expression issue d'une vieille tradition : si un régiment entier périt à l'exception d'un seul soldat, tous les méfaits du survivant sont pardonnés, et il est voué à servir éternellement l'Empereur-Dieu. Mais l'expiation prend de nombreuses formes. Les "boniments des commissaires" ne sont qu'un tissu de mensonges, et nos ancêtres n'ont jamais rien reçu de bon de la part de ces esprits malins et tentateurs. Si vous voulez savoir le reste, vous devriez demander à Vedka. »

languages.text: "İfadeleri mi kastediyorsunuz? Sona kalana kefaret, bir kişi hariç tüm alayın yitmesi durumunda o kişinin tüm yanlışlarının affedildiği ve onu Tanrı İmparator'a sonsuz ve sadık hizmetin beklediği şeklindeki eski bir gelenekten gelir. Fakat kefaret, pek çok şekil alır. Komiser zırvaları yalandır. Atalarımız, o aldatıcı ve baştan çıkarıcı ruhlardan fayda görmemiştir. Kalanını öğrenmek isterseniz Vedka'ya sormalısınız."
languages.original_text: "The sayings, you mean? Atonement for the one comes from an old tradition that, if the whole regiment perishes except for one, then all of that person's wrongdoings are forgiven and eternal and faithful service to the God-Emperor awaits them. But atonement takes many forms. Commissar claptrap means lies, because our forebears never got any good from those deceitful, tempting spirits. If you want to know the rest, you should ask Vedka."

"İfadeleri mi kastediyorsunuz? Sona kalana kefaret, bir kişi hariç tüm alayın yitmesi durumunda o kişinin tüm yanlışlarının affedildiği ve onu Tanrı İmparator'a sonsuz ve sadık hizmetin beklediği şeklindeki eski bir gelenekten gelir. Fakat kefaret, pek çok şekil alır. 'Komiser zırvaları' yalandır. Atalarımız, o aldatıcı ve baştan çıkarıcı ruhlardan fayda görmemiştir. Kalanını öğrenmek isterseniz Vedka'ya sormalısınız."

languages.text: «¿Se refiere a nuestros dichos? "Expiación para el último" proviene de una antigua tradición que dice que, si todo el regimiento muere excepto por una persona, todos sus delitos y ofensas se perdonan, y le aguarda el servicio eterno al Dios Emperador. Pero la expiación presenta numerosas formas. "Paparruchas de comisario" significa mentiras, pues nuestros antepasados nunca recibieron nada bueno de aquellos espíritus mentirosos y tentadores. Si quiere saber más, debería preguntarle a Vedka».
languages.original_text: "The sayings, you mean? Atonement for the one comes from an old tradition that, if the whole regiment perishes except for one, then all of that person's wrongdoings are forgiven and eternal and faithful service to the God-Emperor awaits them. But atonement takes many forms. Commissar claptrap means lies, because our forebears never got any good from those deceitful, tempting spirits. If you want to know the rest, you should ask Vedka."

traits.locale_text: «¿Se refiere a nuestros dichos? "Expiación para el último" proviene de una antigua tradición que dice que, si todo el regimiento muere excepto por una persona, todos sus delitos y ofensas se perdonan, y le aguarda el servicio eterno al Dios Emperador. Pero la expiación presenta numerosas formas. "Paparruchas de comisario" significa mentiras, pues nuestros antepasados nunca recibieron nada bueno de aquellos espíritus mentirosos y tentadores. Si quiere saber más, debería preguntarle a Vedka».

«¿Se refiere a nuestros dichos? "Expiación para el último" proviene de una antigua tradición que dice que, si todo el regimiento muere excepto por una persona, todos sus delitos y ofensas se perdonan, y le aguarda el servicio eterno al Dios Emperador. Pero la expiación presenta numerosas formas. Y esas "paparruchas de comisario" no son más que embustes, pues nuestros antepasados nunca recibieron nada bueno de aquellos espíritus mentirosos y tentadores. Si quiere saber más, debería preguntarle a Vedka».

languages.text: “您是说那些俗语？‘一人之赎’源自一个古老的传统：如果军团只剩一人，那么这个人的所有罪孽都会被赦免，等待他的是对神皇永恒而忠诚的侍奉。但赎罪的形式多种多样。那些政委式的空话全是谎言，因为那些虚伪诱人的灵魂，从来都没给我们的先辈带来过什么好处。如果您想知道别的什么俗语，那就去问薇德卡吧。”
languages.original_text: "The sayings, you mean? Atonement for the one comes from an old tradition that, if the whole regiment perishes except for one, then all of that person's wrongdoings are forgiven and eternal and faithful service to the God-Emperor awaits them. But atonement takes many forms. Commissar claptrap means lies, because our forebears never got any good from those deceitful, tempting spirits. If you want to know the rest, you should ask Vedka."

traits.locale_text: “您是说那些俗语？‘一人之赎’源自一个古老的传统：如果军团只剩一人，那么这个人的所有罪孽都会被赦免，等待他的是对神皇永恒而忠诚的侍奉。但赎罪的形式多种多样。那些政委式的空话全是谎言，因为那些虚伪诱人的灵魂，从来都没给我们的先辈带来过什么好处。如果您想知道别的什么俗语，那就去问薇德卡吧。”

languages.text: "Ihr meint die Sprichwörter? Sühne für den Einzelnen basiert auf einer alten Tradition. Wird bis auf eine Person das gesamte Regiment aufgerieben, sind alle Verfehlungen dieser Person verziehen und sie tritt in den ewigen Dienst für den Gottimperator ein. Allerdings hat die Sühne viele Gesichter. Kommissarsgewäsch sind Lügen, denn unsere Vorfahren haben von diesen tückischen, verführerischen Geistern nie etwas Gutes erfahren. Wollt Ihr den Rest wissen, fragt Vedka."
languages.original_text: "The sayings, you mean? Atonement for the one comes from an old tradition that, if the whole regiment perishes except for one, then all of that person's wrongdoings are forgiven and eternal and faithful service to the God-Emperor awaits them. But atonement takes many forms. Commissar claptrap means lies, because our forebears never got any good from those deceitful, tempting spirits. If you want to know the rest, you should ask Vedka."

Allerdings hat die Sühne viele Gesichter. Kommissarsgewäsch sind Lügen, denn unsere Vorfahren haben von diesen tückischen, verführerischen Geistern nie etwas Gutes erfahren. "Ihr meint die Sprichwörter? Buße für den Einzelnen basiert auf einer alten Tradition. Wird bis auf eine Person das gesamte Regiment aufgerieben, sind alle Verfehlungen dieser Person verziehen und sie tritt in den ewigen Dienst für den Gottimperator ein. Allerdings hat die Buße viele Gesichter. Dieses 'Kommissarsgewäsch' ist eine einzige Lüge, denn unsere Vorfahren haben von diesen tückischen, verführerischen Geistern nie etwas Gutes erfahren. Wollt Ihr den Rest wissen, fragt Vedka."
